hyperedges.label: Velopack Release Pipeline (CI + Install + Update Source)

nodes.label: Generic Host Lifecycle for Desktop Client
nodes.norm_label: generic host lifecycle for desktop client

nodes.label: Local JSON Cache with Offline Retry
nodes.norm_label: local json cache with offline retry

nodes.label: ADR-001: Server-Side Usage Merging
nodes.rationale: Dual-layer merging (client + server) ensures data consistency even on agent crash/duplicate upload. Composite index (DeviceId, AppId, EndTime) keeps merge-lookup fast. Trade-off: extra DB read per upload batch.

nodes.label: ADR-002: Event-Driven Window Tracking
nodes.rationale: WinEvent hooks replace polling for zero CPU idle cost and no missed transitions. Trade-off: dedicated thread with Win32 message pump, platform-locked to Windows.

nodes.label: ADR-003: Generic Host Lifecycle
nodes.rationale: Adopted .NET Generic Host for DI, IHostedService lifecycle, and graceful shutdown (flushing pending uploads). Trade-off: heavier startup for originally simple console app.

nodes.label: ADR-004: ApiKey Header Authentication
nodes.rationale: Custom AuthenticationHandler reads ApiKey from Authorization header instead of DTO body. Enables [Authorize] attribute and centralized auth. Trade-off: DB query per authenticated request, plaintext over HTTPS.

nodes.label: ADR-005: Extract Agent Library
nodes.rationale: Extracted Heartbeat.Agent as reusable class library shared by Console Runner and WPF host via AddHeartbeatAgent(). Trade-off: ConfigManager injection API complexity, net10.0-windows target not portable.

nodes.label: ADR-006: Dedicated Report Endpoints
nodes.rationale: Server-side SQL aggregation via ReportController replaces client-side data processing. Trade-off: two query paths (raw + aggregated) must stay in sync.

nodes.label: ADR-007: Disable Prod Auto-Migration
nodes.rationale: Auto-migration guarded by IsDevelopment() check. Production requires explicit dotnet ef database update. Trade-off: risk of forgetting to run migrations on deploy.

nodes.label: ADR-008: Local Cache Offline Retry
nodes.rationale: Local JSON file cache buffers failed uploads with 10K record cap, atomic rename writes, and ReaderWriterLockSlim. Survives agent restarts. Deduplication handled by server-side merge (ADR-001).

nodes.label: ADR-009: Velopack Auto-Update
nodes.rationale: Chose Velopack (Squirrel successor) for .NET-native auto-update with GitHub Releases integration and delta updates. VelopackApp.Build().Run() must be earliest call in Main.

nodes.label: ADR-010: Per-User LocalAppData Install
nodes.rationale: Install to %LocalAppData%\Heartbeat for UAC-free install/update. Trade-off: multi-user machines need separate installs, no custom path (Velopack limitation).

nodes.label: ADR-011: GitHub Releases Update Source
nodes.rationale: Hardcoded GitHub Releases URL as update source to avoid CDN/infrastructure cost. Trade-off: China users may have download issues; switching requires transitional release.

nodes.label: Device (Domain Entity)
nodes.rationale: Physical machine identified by (OwnerId, HardwareId). HardwareId from Windows MachineGuid. DeviceName is display-only (default hostname, user-editable). Belongs to a User.

nodes.label: App (Domain Entity)
nodes.rationale: Application identified by process executable filename (no path). Multiple windows of same exe = same App.

nodes.label: AppUsage (Domain Entity)
nodes.rationale: Time record of an App being in the foreground (StartTime->EndTime). Includes all foreground windows (explorer.exe, LockApp.exe) without active/inactive filtering.

nodes.label: UsageMerger (Domain Mechanism)
nodes.rationale: Merges fragmented records from upload batching. Rule: same AppName + gap <=1s -> merge. Dual-layer execution (client + server). Does NOT merge cross-switch records.

nodes.label: ApiKey (Auth Credential)
nodes.rationale: Credential for Collection (Agent) to upload data to Analytics, analogous to LLM API Key.

nodes.label: Agent (Desktop Collection Engine)
nodes.rationale: Background collection engine responsible for window switch monitoring, usage record generation, caching, and uploading. Avoid calling it Service or Worker (those are internal implementation layers).

nodes.label: Velopack (Update Framework)
nodes.rationale: Squirrel.Windows successor for .NET desktop auto-update. Manages install/update/uninstall lifecycle, supports delta updates and GitHub Releases integration.

hyperedges.label: Velopack Release Pipeline (CI + Install + Update Source)
